staking_rules.each_way: £1 win + £1 place. Place decimal = advised odds / 5. Won pays both, Top N pays place only.

rows.pl_note: £1 lay won: horse did not win
£1 lay won: horse did not win
£1 EW placed: win lost, place paid
£1 lay won: horse did not win
£1 EW placed: win lost, place paid
£1 lay won: horse did not win
£1 lay won: horse did not win
£1 lay won: horse did not win
